title: Implement ScenePackBuilder projection class
description:
Create a pure projection layer that builds a compact, structured scene summary from live state — the core deliverable of Phase 1 of the situational awareness design.

Implementation:
1. Create `Agent.Core/ScenePack/ScenePackBuilder.cs` (or similar location) as a pure static or injectable class.
2. Define `ScenePack` immutable record:
   - `string Headline` — one-line summary (e.g., "At (-232,65,151), HP 15, idle, 3 entities nearby")
   - `Position Position` — current bot position
   - `int Health`, `int Food` — current vitals
   - `string? GameMode` — survival/creative/etc.
   - `string? CurrentGoal` — goal summary or null if idle
   - `IReadOnlyList<SceneDelta> RecentDeltas` — inventory/position/health changes since last tick
   - `IReadOnlyList<string> NearbyEntities` — compact entity summaries sorted by distance
   - `IReadOnlyList<string> TaskHighlights` — goal-relevant facts (e.g., "oak_log: 5/10 gathered")
   - `IReadOnlyList<string> MemoryReferences` — relevant MemorySmith page slugs for the current goal
   - `DateTimeOffset BuiltAt`
3. Define `SceneDelta` record:
   - `string Field` — what changed ("inventory", "position", "health")
   - `string OldValue`, `string NewValue` — before/after
4. `ScenePackBuilder.Build(WorldState state, IReadOnlyList<WorldEvent> recentEvents, GoalMetadata? goal)`:
   - Compute deltas by comparing current state to recent events.
   - Filter entities to top 8 by distance.
   - Generate task highlights from inventory vs goal requirements.
   - Include relevant MemorySmith page slugs from goal context.
5. Unit test: verify pack size stays compact (no unbounded growth), deltas are correct, empty state produces valid pack.

Acceptance:
- `ScenePack` is deterministic given the same inputs.
- Pack size is bounded (no more than 8 entities, 10 deltas, 8 highlights).
- Works with empty/null inputs.
- Tests pass.

Refs: `memorysmith_situational_awareness_design_doc_20260625T020914Z.md` Phase 1
